ip.h(3) Library Functions Manual ip.h(3)

NAME

ip.h - 🌍 IP Address Parsing and Formatting Utilities

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int is_valid_ipv4 (const char *ip)
Check if a string is a valid IPv4 address. int is_valid_ipv6 (const char *ip)
Check if a string is a valid IPv6 address. int parse_ipv6_address (const char *input, char *output, size_t output_size)
Parse IPv6 address, removing brackets if present. int parse_ip_with_port (const char *input, char *ip_output, size_t ip_output_size, uint16_t *port_output)
Parse IP address and port from string. int parse_address_with_optional_port (const char *input, char *address_output, size_t address_output_size, uint16_t *port_output, uint16_t default_port)
Parse address with optional port from string. asciichat_error_t format_ip_address (int family, const struct sockaddr *addr, char *output, size_t output_size)
Format IP address from socket address structure. asciichat_error_t format_ip_with_port (const char *ip, uint16_t port, char *output, size_t output_size)
Format IP address with port number. int get_ip_version (const char *ip)
Get IP address version. int is_valid_ip (const char *ip)
Check if string is a valid IP address (IPv4 or IPv6). int ip_equals (const char *ip1, const char *ip2)
Compare two IP addresses for equality. int ip_compare (const char *ip1, const char *ip2)
Compare two IP addresses for sorting. int compare_ip_port_strings (const char *ip_port1, const char *ip_port2)
Compare two IP:port"stringswithIPv6normalization. int parse_cidr (const char *cidr, char *ip_out, size_t ip_out_size, int *prefix_out)
Parse CIDR notation into IP and prefix length. int ip_in_cidr (const char *ip, const char *cidr)
Check if IP address is within CIDR range. int ip_in_cidr_parsed (const char *ip, const char *network, int prefix_len)
Check if IP is within CIDR range (parsed form). asciichat_error_t ipv4_to_ipv6_mapped (const char *ipv4, char *ipv6_out, size_t out_size)
Convert IPv4 address to IPv6-mapped format. asciichat_error_t extract_ipv4_from_mapped_ipv6 (const char *ipv6, char *ipv4_out, size_t out_size)
Extract IPv4 address from IPv6-mapped format. int is_ipv4_mapped_ipv6 (const char *ipv6)
Check if IPv6 address is IPv4-mapped. asciichat_error_t canonicalize_ipv6 (const char *ipv6, char *canonical_out, size_t out_size)
Canonicalize IPv6 address to standard form. asciichat_error_t expand_ipv6 (const char *ipv6, char *expanded_out, size_t out_size)
Expand IPv6 address to full form. asciichat_error_t compact_ipv6 (const char *ipv6, char *compact_out, size_t out_size)
Compress IPv6 address using :: notation. int is_anycast_ipv6 (const char *ipv6)
Check if IPv6 address is anycast. int is_lan_ipv4 (const char *ip)
Check if IPv4 address is a private/LAN address. int is_lan_ipv6 (const char *ip)
Check if IPv6 address is a private/LAN address. int is_broadcast_ipv4 (const char *ip)
Check if IPv4 address is a broadcast address. int is_broadcast_ipv6 (const char *ip)
Check if IPv6 address is a multicast address. int is_localhost_ipv4 (const char *ip)
Check if IPv4 address is localhost. int is_localhost_ipv6 (const char *ip)
Check if IPv6 address is localhost. int is_link_local_ipv4 (const char *ip)
Check if IPv4 address is a link-local address. int is_link_local_ipv6 (const char *ip)
Check if IPv6 address is a link-local address. int is_internet_ipv4 (const char *ip)
Check if IPv4 address is a public internet address. int is_internet_ipv6 (const char *ip)
Check if IPv6 address is a public internet address. int extract_ip_from_address (const char *addr_with_port, char *ip_out, size_t ip_out_size)
Extract IP address (without port) from formatted address string. const char * get_ip_type_string (const char *ip)
Get human-readable string describing IP address type.

Detailed Description

🌍 IP Address Parsing and Formatting Utilities

Definition in file ip.h.
